sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34064" key="e)mbroxi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμβροχίζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">βρόχος</etym>) <sense id="n34064.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">catch in a noose</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0548.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:5:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
